name: loom-use
description: Drive a LOOM live-visuals rig with an agent: the loom MCP control surface plus the using-LOOM skills (library-use, module-authoring, scene-composition). For people who have LOOM running, not for developing LOOM itself.

ws_port.title: LOOM WebSocket port
ws_port.description: Port the sidecar listens on for your LOOM engine to dial in. Must match the port your LOOM engine connects to (its ?ws= / LOOM_WS_PORT). Default 7341.
